/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/sdr-tests.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-tests.dir/test_framing.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-tests.dir/test_fec.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-tests.dir/test_modem.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-tests.dir/test_crypto.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-tests.dir/test_dsp.cpp.o" -o sdr-tests  ../src/core/libsdr_core.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libiio.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libliquid.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
